perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male creator in a black shirt and white headphones sits behind a microphone, holding a paper list and gesturing enthusiastically. (2) Chronological sequence showing various dried fruit snacks on wooden trays, followed by the creator holding up 'EATON' branded snack packaging. (3) A female co-host in a striped shirt appears, holding a pair of novelty hand-shaped food tongs. (4) The man displays a woven picnic basket and a numbered oil painting kit. (5) The man holds multiple bags of snacks toward the camera while talking.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music plays. A male voice speaks with high energy, rhythmically listing fruit names in Mandarin. (2) Sound effects like 'pop' and 'ting' occur during text overlays, followed by a burst of canned applause SFX. (3) A female voice enters with a bright tone, interacting with the male speaker about gift items. (4) The music and vocals continue at a high-density pace until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Mandarin subtitles translate the spoken content throughout. (2) Decorative Text: '可嘎 543' branding in the corner; large colorful labels for fruit types like '蘋果', '蔓越莓', '草莓'. (3) Promotional Text: '台灣在地小農' (Taiwan local farmers), '$1799 一起走走野餐組' (Picnic set price), and tiered gift labels like '消費滿1000 贈小手食物夾' (Gift for $1000 spend).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Listing -> Bundle Promotion -> Tiered Gift Reveal

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The male creator is wearing a black polo shirt and white AirPods Max. The female co-host wears a black and white horizontal striped long-sleeve shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A studio setting with an 'ON AIR' sign, shelves filled with numerous figurines and collectibles (Funko Pops, etc.).

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence/Product Listing -> Value Proposition -> Call to Action via Incentives
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to drive sales for a limited edition snack bundle '嘎哥限定組合' from the brand EATON. It utilizes the creator's high energy to showcase the variety of Taiwanese-sourced dried fruits and builds purchase motivation through a tiered gift system including novelty tongs, a painting kit, and extra snack packs.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of EATON branded packaging, explicit pricing mention, and specific gift incentives for total purchase amounts.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy variety show style editing, variety-show style text pop-ups, 'Ga Ge' branding.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical influencer marketing in Taiwan, focusing on high CP (Cost-Performance) value and limited-time bundles to create urgency.
